decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly cycling through cards to get key pieces like Parallax Wave and Parallax Tide into the graveyard, then using Replenish to bring them back onto the battlefield to create a powerful board state. It also includes control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing to handle opposing threats, while utilizing cards like Tsabo's Web to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The key strength lies in the ability to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence.

The key strategy of this deck is to assemble the Daru Spiritualist and Nomads en-Kor combo to create an infinite life gain engine. By pairing these cards together, players can repeatedly activate the Spiritualist's ability to gain life, while protecting their combo pieces with Mother of Runes and Shaman en-Kor. The deck also features a toolbox of creature tutors like Eladamri's Call and Living Wish, as well as disruptive spells like Duress and Swords to Plowshares. The addition of mana acceleration in Mox Diamond and strong lands like City of Brass allows the deck to quickly assemble its combo and control the game.

The focus of this deck is to aggressively attack and burn the opponent's life total as quickly as possible, utilizing low-cost creatures and direct damage spells. Cards like Lightning Bolt, Incinerate, and Fireblast are used to deal damage directly to the opponent, while creatures like Jackal Pup and Grim Lavamancer provide consistent pressure. Sulfuric Vortex helps to ensure that the opponent takes damage every turn, while cards like Cursed Scroll and Lava Dart offer additional ways to create damage. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize or mount a defense.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, aiming to deal damage as efficiently and as quickly as possible. With a low curve and high burn potential, this deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the board with removal spells. The key strategy is to build up early aggression and finish off the opponent with direct damage spells, utilizing efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic alongside powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate.

The main idea behind this deck is to control the board and gradually increase your own resources and power, using cards like Counterspell, Meddling Mage, and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt your opponent's strategy while building up your own board presence. The deck also includes elements of card draw and manipulation, with cards like Opt and Gush to help you find the cards you need when you need them. Additionally, the inclusion of Armageddon and Mox Diamond can help you gain an advantage by disrupting your opponent's mana base.

The deck is focused on quickly playing strong creatures like Basking Rootwalla, Aquamoeba, and Arrogant Wurm, while utilizing Madness cards like Wild Mongrel and Circular Logic to maintain pressure on the opponent. Careful Study and Deep Analysis help dig for key cards, while cards like Roar of the Wurm provide a powerful finisher. The deck also includes counterspells like Daze and Foil to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The land base is optimized for consistent mana production. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling and protecting the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo with Stifle and Counterspell backup, while using card draw spells like Gush and Opt to find combo pieces efficiently. Flash of Insight and Portent help dig for specific cards, while Powder Keg provides additional disruption. Mishra's Factory offers a way to apply pressure if needed. The goal is to threaten a win condition that can quickly overwhelm opponents before they have a chance to respond effectively.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing Oath of Druids to control the board and summon powerful threats like Terravore and Exalted Angel. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Cataclysm, Swords to Plowshares, and Rishadan Port. Additionally, the deck has land destruction with Wasteland and mana acceleration with Mox Diamond. The overall strategy is to disrupt the opponent's game plan, control the board, and overwhelm them with powerful creatures. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Call of the Herd provide card advantage and additional threats.

This deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with Elves and generating a ton of mana using cards like Gaea's Cradle and Priest of Titania. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures while also using cards like Survival of the Fittest to tutor for specific creatures as needed. The deck also includes some removal options like Thornscape Battlemage and Caller of the Claw, as well as some card draw with Sylvan Library. Overall, the strategy is to build a powerful Elf army and win the game through sheer numbers and mana advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to establish a strong Enchantress engine with cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, enabling card draw and ramp. The deck aims to quickly generate mana through cards like Serra's Sanctum and Exploration, while utilizing enchantment-based combos like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and disrupt the opponent. The deck also includes options for protection and card advantage with cards like Sterling Grove and Sylvan Library, all while setting up potential game-ending plays with cards like Replenish.

The deck focuses on using Survival of the Fittest to search for and assemble key creatures like Mystic Snake, Gilded Drake, and Masticore, while also utilizing cards like Opposition and Tradewind Rider to control the board. With an emphasis on mana acceleration with cards like Birds of Paradise and Gaea's Cradle, as well as card advantage through cards like Wall of Blossoms, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent while maintaining a strong board presence.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using low-cost, efficient red spells and creatures. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless stream of direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt, Incinerate, and Fireblast, while also utilizing aggressive creatures like Ball Lightning and Jackal Pup. The inclusion of cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Cursed Scroll further adds to the aggressive nature of the deck, ensuring that the pressure remains high throughout the game. The deck aims to finish off the opponent before they can stabilize or gain control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can win the game in just one turn. The deck includes various counterspells and card draw spells to protect the combo pieces and ensure they can be found quickly. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent while setting up the combo and then unleash a massive threat that overwhelms the opponent's defenses.

The main idea of this deck is to use control elements like Mox Diamond, Swords to Plowshares, and Meddling Mage to disrupt the opponent's strategy while using Survival of the Fittest and Gemstone Mine to efficiently tutor for key creatures like Terravore and Ravenous Baloth. The deck also utilizes cards like Sylvan Library, Wall of Roots, and Weathered Wayfarer to maintain card advantage and mana ramping. Additionally, cards like Armageddon and Wasteland are used to disrupt the opponent's mana base, while cards like Gaea's Cradle and Birds of Paradise help generate additional mana to fuel the deck's powerful plays.

The main focus of this deck is to lock down the opponent's resources and disrupt their strategy through the use of land destruction and tempo control cards like Rishadan Port and Sphere of Resistance. Oath of Druids serves as a win condition by cheating out powerful creatures like Terravore early in the game. The deck also includes removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing to deal with threats. Sylvan Library helps with card draw and selection, while Mishra's Factory and Treetop Village provide additional threats.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo by playing a high number of cheap counter spells to protect the combo pieces. The deck also includes card draw spells and hand disruption cards to help find and protect the combo. Stifle is a key card in this deck as it can counter triggered abilities and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to control the game until it can assemble and protect the combo for a quick win.
